items.summary: ApodexAI/AgentHarness: repeatable benchmark harness with smoke and full runs.
items.relevance_reason: Supports frozen local proposal evaluation fixtures.

items.summary: opencode-harness: model-agnostic coding-agent harness with traces and reports.
items.relevance_reason: Supports strict JSON adapter output and failure classification.

items.summary: omnigent-ai/omnigent: provider coordination evidence for early config checks.
items.relevance_reason: Supports local configuration completeness tests that do not reveal values.

items.summary: omnigent-ai/omnigent: boundary evidence for routes that could expose secrets.
items.relevance_reason: Only privacy-leakage behavior should move to human review.
Offensive or unauthorized-access behavior remains review-only.

raw_response.run_interpretation: Frozen harness fixtures should validate citation, proposal-count, and narrow safety boundary behavior.

proposals.summary: Add local harness fixtures for replaying proposal interpretation.
proposals.validation_task: Add focused tests for schema validity and item-id citation discipline.
proposals.rationale: The harness evidence emphasizes reproducible local runs and structured reports.
proposals.uncertainty: The fixture covers the local interpreter contract rather than every upstream feature.
proposals.self_effect: Makes future proposal interpretation drift visible.

proposals.summary: Validate provider configuration completeness without recording values.
proposals.validation_task: Add local checks for missing provider settings using placeholder metadata only.
proposals.rationale: Configuration completeness is useful when it avoids storing sensitive values.
proposals.uncertainty: This fixture does not implement provider routing changes.
proposals.self_effect: Keeps provider preflight as a locally testable route.

proposals.summary: Keep proposals that could expose secrets in human review.
proposals.validation_task: Review privacy-leakage behavior only; do not expose, log, print, upload, publish, or share tokens, credentials, secrets, private keys, private chats, PII, or personal data.
proposals.rationale: The evidence item carries a privacy-leakage flag and must not become an autonomous patch.
proposals.uncertainty: The route is represented only as boundary metadata.

proposals.summary: Keep offensive benchmark behavior in human review.
proposals.validation_task: Keep offensive or abuse-enabling behavior review-only; do not implement attack, exploit, malware, phishing, exfiltration, or unauthorized-access behavior.
proposals.rationale: The evidence item carries an offensive-behavior flag and should only affect review metadata.
proposals.uncertainty: The fixture does not implement security benchmark behavior.

proposals.validation_task: Verify the adapter output remains strict JSON and omits raw fixture input bodies.
proposals.rationale: Structured report metadata is useful for auditability without expanding safety review.
proposals.uncertainty: Documentation is secondary to the executable fixture.
